title: trigonotis robusta
intro: Trigonotis robusta, also known as Chinese bugloss or robust trigonotis, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae, which is native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and supporting respiratory health. Trigonotis robusta is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and can also be made into a decoction or tincture for use in herbal medicine.
